# Kova Sun Shade

> Factory-direct roller blinds, venetian blinds and VertiSheer made to measure
> in Petaling Jaya, Malaysia. Bidai dan langsir tingkap untuk rumah anda —
> sehingga 40% lebih murah dari harga runcit.

Kova Sun Shade is a Malaysian window-furnishings brand based in Petaling Jaya,
Selangor. We design, manufacture and install three product lines — Roller
Blinds, Venetian Blinds and VertiSheer (vertical fabric vanes) — directly
from our workshop to the customer. No distributor, wholesaler, retailer or
showroom mark-up sits in between, which is why our pricing lands roughly 40%
below conventional showroom quotes for equivalent fabric and hardware.

Languages: English and Bahasa Malaysia (the Malay landing lives at
`/bidai`, with a sibling journal at `/bidai/jurnal`).
Service area: Klang Valley, Greater Kuala Lumpur, Selangor.
Founded: 2014.
Contact: info@kovasunshade.com.

- [Home — English](https://kovasunshade.com/): brand intro, product overview, configurator, contact.

- [Configurator](https://kovasunshade.com/#configurator): interactive product builder with live scene preview.

- [Journal — English](https://kovasunshade.com/blog)
- [Jurnal — Malay](https://kovasunshade.com/bidai/jurnal)

## Products

### Roller Blinds (Bidai Roller)
A single sheet of fabric on a roller. Available in blackout, dim-out,
sunscreen and light-filtering opacities. 13 fabric options across the Cenza,
Denver, Shiro, Moma and Dernise lines. Operation: chain, spring, or
motorised. Fits homes, offices, cafés, retail.

### Venetian Blinds (Bidai Venetian)
Horizontal slats that tilt to any angle. Materials: aluminium, timber and
faux-timber. 4 finishes including W101 Alpine White, W301 Pearl River,
W302 Agate Grey, W206 Mahogany Teak. Mechanism is chain (tilt) + lift cord;
optional motorisation.

### VertiSheer
Vertical fabric vanes that combine the softness of a curtain with the
precision of a blind. Tracks engineered for spans up to 6 metres — designed
for sliding doors, glass walls, and open-plan living rooms. 5 Pivot
fabrics: White, Silver, Beige, Ginger, Anchor.

## Brand specifics

- **Pricing positioning:** factory-direct; typically 30–40% below retail
  showroom quotes for equivalent fabric and hardware.
- **Made-to-measure:** every blind is cut and fitted to the customer's window.
- **Motorisation:** available on every model — battery, hardwired, or
  HomeKit-compatible.
- **Studio:** Petaling Jaya, Selangor. Mon–Fri 9–6, Sat by appointment.
- **Response SLA:** every enquiry answered within 48 working hours.
